The plan.md flows directly from Step 1.5 (digest match, proceed silently) to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) at line 59 without any user interaction or pause. The mismatch behavior (lines 82-90 of digest-match.md) describes alerting and pausing, but is explicitly marked 'not triggered in this scenario'. No contradictory evidence exists in either file.
